notes: Fonts are missing and will be represented as empty squares, although it's very easy to fix - install allfonts via winetricks (I also installed corefonts although I don't think that was necessary). Additionally, controller support is iffy, the best workaround is to disable the d-pad and left stick and remap them to keyboard arrow keys using Steam Input. Once you do that, the game runs absolutely flawlessly.
title: Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX

notes: Game works perfectly; fonts do not match with Windows, causing some text to overflow out of text boxes.
title: Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX

notes: Game works well, however you are unable to use a controller properly. Keyboard controls are fine. Fonts do not match with Windows, causing some text to overflow out of text boxes.
title: Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX
